selected_tasks.body_preview: Make `yyds state lifecycle --limit 5` show actual run/model-call counts from the live events log instead of returning all zeros. Why this matters: The assessment shows `state lifecycle --limit 5` reports 0 runs started, 0 completed, 0 model calls — even when run/model events exist in the events file.
